summary: Sales Board 16 Stages, Stage Intercepts, Phone Masking, and Auto-Blocks Testing Complete. All backend tests pass (12/12). Frontend shows 16 stages correctly with proper ordering. Stage intercepts (Discussion/Lost/RE-To Client remarks, Lost reason) work via API. Auto-blocks for Project Onboarded and RE-From Planning verified.

success_rate.backend: 100% (12/12 passed - 2 rate-limited tests passed on retry)
